name: beliq/shopware-beliq
description: Generate compliant EN 16931 e-invoices from Shopware orders through the beliq API.

description.en-GB: Turn Shopware orders into compliant EN 16931 e-invoices (XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Factur-X, Peppol BIS) through the beliq API.
description.de-DE: Shopware-Bestellungen in konforme EN-16931-E-Rechnungen (XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Factur-X, Peppol BIS) ueber die beliq-API umwandeln.
